ops.body:
Shipped. cc-skills 0.12.0 (1be0b1f76855): ab/abwc-seed take --session <name> (AB_SESSION env fallback, flag wins); the override SUFFIXES the requestor-derived TAG before slugification, so the Touch ID grant stays requestor-keyed (one tap per session) while browser sessions fork per agent. abwc-seed forwards the flag on every ab call, the direct state-load call included; a dangling or empty --session value errors rather than silently landing on the shared session. SKILL.md: fan-out bullet documents the working recipe with per-slug close discipline, and Notes carry the 160-char --reason truncation cap.

Live-verified on this Mac: two same-session agents on isolated pages (alpha github.com / beta HN), exactly one Touch ID tap, per-slug close released only its own Browserbase keepAlive session, the suffixless find never adopted a suffixed session, AB_SESSION fallback + flag-wins spot-checked, --local pass green.

Two pre-existing seeding defects surfaced by the live verify, fixed in the same commit: (1) pinned --domain invalidated the whole CDP cookie batch for any __Host--carrying host (github.com) — Browserbase seeding now opens each host and sets unpinned; (2) storage seeding cost one daemon roundtrip per key (1,484 for github.com, 30+ min) — now one eval --stdin per origin, ~19s end to end, page verified logged-in with 1,483 keys.

getaway side landed as 17dabcd1590c: gather.md Browser read rides abwc-seed --session with a 0.12.0 floor and a pre-0.12.0 degrade line; getaway SKILL invariant reworded; CHANGELOG Unreleased bullet added — the doctrine ships with getaway's next release cut (plugin.json untouched; the in-flight seat-quality arc owns the cadence). Follow-up filed in cookie-sync backlog (3e458cf): cookiesync webstorage emits a malformed origin (https://github.com/^0https://lemire.me, two origins glued) which the seeder then opens as a URL.
